title: Online Charter Schools Add In-Person Days—Here's Why
metaDescription: Virtual charter schools are adding regular in-person events to close the socialization gap. Here's what the research shows and how leading schools are doing it.

title: The Charter Facilities Gap Is Finally Getting Fixed
metaDescription: Eight states passed new charter facilities funding laws in 2025. Here's what the landmark changes mean for school leaders, families, and the sector's growth.

title: Charter Schools Are Redefining What a Diploma Is Worth
metaDescription: More charter schools are graduating students with industry credentials alongside diplomas. Here's what the trend means for leaders and families in 2025.
